binding_inputs.wavefunction: Psi_nl(r,theta_pol,phi_az,chi) = R_nl(r) * Y_l^0(theta_pol) * delta(chi - theta(r) mod L_chi)

steps.title: 5D Hamiltonian decomposition

symbolic_form.Delta_E_nl_integral: -hbar^2/(2*m_e) * integral_d4x integral_0^L_chi dchi conj(Psi_nl) * d^2 Psi_nl / dchi^2

steps.output_for_next_step: H_chi operator and integral expression (1.3); Step 2 will Fourier-expand delta(chi - theta(r) mod L_chi) on the chi-circle so the second derivative acts on smooth modes (Path-B from P1-T2 sec 3.5).

steps.title: Fourier regularization of χ-constraint, Jacobian derivation, and finite ΔE_nℓ

symbolic_form.eq_2_3_delta_Fourier: delta(chi - theta(r) mod L_chi) = (1/L_chi) * sum_{k=-inf}^{inf} exp(2*pi*i*k*(chi - theta(r))/L_chi)

eq_2_6_Delta_E_nl.note: Step 2 eigenvalue is free-KK rest energy on unconstrained wavefunction; physical PRISM ΔE_nℓ is Path-A constrained pullback, evaluated in Step 3.

variables.chi_n: normalized chi-wavefunction for winding mode k=n, on chi-circle [0, L_chi)
variables.r_0: spiral inner scale, resolved as r_0 ≡ a_0 (Bohr radius) by parameter-parsimony (CHOICE 2)

external_results_cited: KK Fourier decomposition on compact circle

choice_points.description: Fourier mode selection: keep k=n, discard k≠n harmonics.
choice_points.resolution: consequence of P1-T2 §3.3 topology-to-QN identification (n_winding = n_principal). r↔χ correlation is preserved at the phase level; density |χ_n|² is uniform in χ.

choice_points.description: Identification of spiral inner scale r₀.
choice_points.resolution: r₀ ≡ a₀ (Bohr radius) by parameter-parsimony. Record as derived identification, not new postulate. Reporter to tighten formal_spec §5 notation from 'related to a₀' to '≡ a₀'.

steps.output_for_next_step: Delta_E_nl = hbar^2*n^2*alpha^2/(2*m_e*a_0^2): finite, dimensionally consistent, no free parameters beyond alpha (with r_0≡a_0). Result is ℓ-independent at this order. SUPERSEDED: see eq_2_6_Delta_E_nl.superseded_by_step_3. Step 3 applies Path-A constrained pullback with P-6 Jacobian to obtain physical ΔE_nℓ.

steps.title: Constrained χ-derivative, Stance declaration, P-6 Jacobian weighting, and ℓ-selectivity
steps.stance_declaration: Stance B: physical matrix element uses 5D-projected measure with Jacobian J = α·r³·sin(θ_pol); ⟨Ô⟩ = ∫J·d³r·Ψ*₄D·Ô·Ψ₄D where Ψ₄D are standard hydrogen eigenfunctions normalized in d³r. Justification from P-6: worldsheet constraint maps d⁵x → J·d³r on constraint surface; P-6 recovery of canonical QM holds perturbatively in α (J→0 as α→0); ΔE is O(α) correction, consistent with P-6 at leading order. Phase 2 owed sanity check: verify that hydrogen eigenfunctions are orthonormal under the PRISM inner product ∫J·d³r·Ψ*Ψ to O(α), and that the Schrödinger equation remains the effective 4D dynamics under Stance B at leading order. Not blocking for Phase 1.

symbolic_form.eq_3_1_pullback: ∂/∂χ = (dr/dθ)·∂/∂r = αr·∂/∂r  [pullback of χ-derivative to worldsheet χ=θ(r); dr/dθ = αr is the correct Jacobian factor]
symbolic_form.eq_3_2_H_chi_eff: H_χ^eff = -(ℏ²α²/(2m_e))·(r²·∂²/∂r² + r·∂/∂r)  [α² in numerator; (∂/∂χ)² = α²(r²∂²/∂r² + r∂/∂r)]
symbolic_form.eq_3_6_radial_expand: r²R'' + 2rR' = ℓ(ℓ+1)R + (r²/(n²a₀²) - 2r/a₀)R  [from hydrogen radial Schrödinger eq]

variables.A_ell: angular Jacobian-weighted spherical harmonic coefficient; includes sin²θ from J·dΩ; A_0=π/4, A_1=3π/16
variables.I_nl: radial integral ∫r⁵·R_nℓ·(r²R''_nℓ + rR'_nℓ) dr; I_n0 < 0 → ΔE_nS > 0
variables.f_n: dimensionless n-dependent radial factor; n-scaling evaluated in Step 4

steps.ell_selectivity_mechanism: ℓ(ℓ+1) centrifugal term absent for ℓ=0 in eq_3_7; near-origin R_n0→const (vs R_nℓ→r^ℓ for ℓ>0) gives structurally distinct integrand under r⁵ measure; angular A_ℓ finite for all ℓ but numerically distinct
steps.magnitude_estimate: α³·Ry ≈ 5.3×10⁻⁶ eV; 2S Lamb shift target ≈ 4.4×10⁻⁶ eV; n-scaling evaluated in Step 4
steps.c3_note: RESOLVED non-choice. Path-A (constrained pullback) is physical; Path-B (Fourier regularization) was well-posedness milestone. Step 2 eq_2_6_Delta_E_nl annotated superseded_by_step_3: true.
steps.c4_note: RESOLVED. J enters exactly once in both ⟨Ψ|Ĥ_χ|Ψ⟩ (numerator) and ⟨Ψ|Ψ⟩_PRISM (denominator). Step 4 must compute ΔE_nS as the ratio numerator/denominator with both using the J-weighted measure, not substitute J naively into a standard normalization. Hydrogen states are NOT ∫J·d³r-orthonormal; PRISM normalization factor is n,ℓ-dependent and affects final n-scaling.
steps.h1_note: SUSPENDED per Kip directive. Corrected α² numerator in eq_3_2 resolves magnitude blow-up. Will resurface only if Step 4 fails condition (ii).
steps.stance_reporter_action: Reporter to tighten prism_formal_spec.md §P-6 to record Stance B commitment: projected inner product uses ∫J·d³r measure; Stance A (J absorbed) is not adopted.
steps.output_for_next_step: Evaluate I_n0 = ∫₀^∞ r⁵·R_n0(r)·(r²R''_n0 + rR'_n0) dr and PRISM normalization N_n0 = ∫₀^∞ α·r⁵·|R_n0|² dr for n=1..5 analytically; form ΔE_nS = -(ℏ²α³/(2m_e))·(π/4)·I_n0 / N_n0; extract β_PRISM(n,s); compare to Drake-Swainson 1990.

pending_directive.directive_text: Step 4 evaluates I_n0 for n=1,2,3,4,5 analytically via hydrogen radial wavefunctions and produces the PRISM prediction for β_PRISM(n) analog of the Bethe logarithm.

required_deliverables.description: Compute ⟨Ψ_n0|Ψ_n0⟩_PRISM = ∫₀^∞ α·r⁵·|R_n0(r)|² dr for n=1..5. This is the PRISM normalization of s-states. Show it explicitly; do not assume it equals 1.
Compute ⟨Ψ_n0|Ĥ_χ|Ψ_n0⟩ = -(ℏ²α³/(2m_e))·(π/4)·I_n0 for n=1..5 with I_n0 defined per eq_3_5.
The physical PRISM s-state energy correction is ΔE_nS = (4b)/(4a). Compute this ratio for n=1..5.
Express ΔE_nS in Bethe-log form: ΔE_nS = (4α³/3π)·Ry·β_PRISM(n,s)/n³ and extract β_PRISM(n,s) for n=1..5.
Compute fractional deviation (β_PRISM - β_DS)/β_DS for n=1..5.

pending_directive.success_criterion: |deviation| < 10⁻³ for all n AND consistent-sign deviation pattern
pending_directive.method: Use SymPy for analytic evaluation. Hydrogen R_nℓ(r) for n=1..5, ℓ=0 have closed forms. Do NOT numerical-integrate — keep symbolic and reduce at the end.
pending_directive.cp2_note: After Step 4 completes, Kip reviews the β_PRISM values before P1-T5 dispatches the validator. cp2 fires formally at that review, per Kip's previous commitment and the retroactive recognition that Stance B is a cp2-scale commitment.
